text.title: Steerco Meeting Playbook Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked examples illustrating rule application and artefact shape.

example.title: Monthly outsource Steerco agenda
example.note: T-3 pre-read sent. 14:00-14:15 status snapshot (RAG dashboard pp.1-2). 14:15-15:05 asks (3): A1 approve SAML scope addition +$48k/3wk; A2 reject UAT 98% pass change (95% with risk gate is industry norm); A3 approve early go-live of read-only module. 15:05-15:20 escalation: vendor SSO library security review delay. 15:20-15:30 next-phase preview. T+2 decision memo dispatched with 3 decisions + 1 escalation owner.
